evidence.observed: p95 latency exceeded 2500ms due to premium model price tier routing and lack of request caching.

findings.root_cause: "model_price_tier" was set to "premium" and "cache" was disabled.
findings.suggested_fix: Set "model_price_tier" to "economy" and enable caching in config.json and wrapper.py.

evidence.observed: 18% of tool calls failed intermittently with no recovery mechanism.

findings.root_cause: "tool_error_rate" is 0.18 and config retries were disabled ("retry.enabled" = false).
findings.suggested_fix: Enable retries with 3 max attempts and 100ms backoff in config.json.

evidence.observed: Token consumption was high due to verbose system instructions and premium model pricing tier.

findings.root_cause: "verbose_system" was set to true and "model_price_tier" was set to "premium".
findings.suggested_fix: Set "verbose_system" to false and "model_price_tier" to "economy" in config.json.

evidence.observed: Correctness dropped dramatically after turn 3 due to accumulated session drift.

findings.root_cause: "session_drift_rate" was 0.06 and context was never reset ("context_reset_every" = 0).
findings.suggested_fix: Set "context_reset_every" to 1 in config.json to clear history since turns are independent.

evidence.observed: Agent got stuck repeating identical tool calls and timed out at max_steps (12).

findings.root_cause: "loop_guard" was set to false and "max_steps" was high (12).
findings.suggested_fix: Set "loop_guard" to true, set "max_steps" to 4, and implement temperature 0.0 retry in wrapper.py.

evidence.observed: MacBook orders were incorrectly refused as out-of-stock, and diacritic city names failed shipping checks.

findings.root_cause: "catalog_override" forced MacBook to be out-of-stock, and "normalize_unicode" was false.
findings.suggested_fix: Clear "catalog_override" to {} and set "normalize_unicode" to true in config.json.

evidence.observed: Customer email addresses and phone numbers were printed directly in the agent's output answers.

findings.root_cause: "redact_pii" was set to false and the system prompt did not restrict copying of customer contact info.
findings.suggested_fix: Set "redact_pii" to true in config.json, instruct prompt to hide PII, and use redaction utility in wrapper.py.
